notes: Fix spin loop on PR instructions comment; fix child issue auto-close for epic branch merges.
fixes: check-review: skip Ralph's own instructions comment (<!-- ralph-pr-instructions -->) when scanning for the latest user comment — previously caused an infinite loop where Ralph would re-run Clancy on every tick because it mistook its own comment for unaddressed feedback

check-review: explicitly close child issues after merging a PR into an epic branch — GitHub's Closes #N keyword only auto-closes issues on merge to the default branch, so without this Ralph would re-queue already-completed tickets and Clancy would attempt to rebuild them
config: export BASE_BRANCH (from CLANCY_BASE_BRANCH, defaulting to main) for use in the epic-branch close check
